History

Kadir Has University Faculty of Economics and Administrative Sciences was founded in 1999 and continued its educational journey by taking the name of Faculty of Economics, Administrative and Social Sciences in 2011. Our faculty aims to provide students with competencies such as analytical thinking, leadership, research and critical evaluation by providing a strong academic framework in different fields of social sciences with its deep-rooted history and innovative vision. Our faculty, which provides education at international standards, not only provides its students with theoretical knowledge; it also prepares them for the business world and academia with applied projects, internships, exchange programs and sectoral collaborations. Our academic staff, who are experts in their fields, closely follow global developments and provide our students with the knowledge and skills that will make a difference in the national and international arena. With English education opportunities and rich academic programs, our faculty provides students with a global perspective and comprehensive guidance to take strong steps in their careers.
